empty.title: Start a meeting
empty.line1: Real-time speech recognition, translation, and question detection

prepared.hint: Press "Start Recording" to begin real-time speech recognition.

question.notFound: No answer found in registered materials.

popover.title: This person is
popover.hintRegister: Register participants when starting a meeting to select them here

errors.reshareTab: Please re-share the tab audio. Make sure "Share tab audio" is checked in the share dialog.
errors.permissionDenied: Microphone or tab-share permission denied. Please allow it from the lock icon in the browser address bar.
errors.shareCancelled: Tab audio sharing was cancelled. When retrying, make sure "Share tab audio" is checked.
errors.serverConnection: Failed to connect to the Q note server. Please refresh and try again.

startModal.briefHint: Adding meeting purpose, caveats, and topics greatly improves translation, summary, and answer quality.
startModal.briefPlaceholder:
Example:
- Purpose: Investor pitch for a new SaaS product
- Materials: Pitch deck v3 attached
- Caveat: Revenue figures are under NDA
startModal.participantsHint: Enter individuals or groups. Used for speaker matching after the meeting.
startModal.translationHint: Sub-translation below each utterance. Default = your language ({{lang}}).
startModal.materialsHintLine1: "Find Answer" searches these materials first. If nothing is found, it falls back to general AI knowledge.
startModal.materialsHintLine2: <1>Prefer text or links.</1> Use files for small slides/docs.
startModal.materialsHintLine3: Max 10 MB per file · up to 5 files · PDF · DOCX · TXT · MD · text-based PDFs only (no scans)
startModal.dropzoneText: Drag & drop files or click to select
startModal.pastedPlaceholder:
Paste text copied from email, Notion, or a web page.
Can be used together with files.
startModal.urlPlaceholder: https://... (blog, public Notion page, PDF link, etc.)
startModal.urlHint: Only public pages can be auto-extracted. For private/login pages, paste the text directly.

fileError.tooMany: You can upload at most {{max}} files.
fileError.urlInvalid: URL must start with http:// or https://.
